attributes.description: Detect and inventory Shadow AI tools across your fleet — local LLMs, AI coding agents, AI desktop applications, MCP servers (with config content scanning), AI model files, Python/npm AI packages, browser extensions, Docker containers, auto-start services, GPU-equipped systems, AI API key exposure, and AI tool configuration directories. Provides fleet-wide visibility into unauthorized or unmanaged AI deployments on endpoints.
attributes.name: ai-asset-discovery

queries.query:
-- Running LLM Runtime Detection
-- Identifies local LLM servers, inference engines, and AI model serving processes
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, vLLM, GPT4All, Jan, LocalAI, KoboldCpp,
-- text-generation-webui, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM, LiteLLM, llamafile, MLC LLM, ComfyUI
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'ollama', 'lms', 'gpt4all', 'jan', 'msty', 'local-ai',
    'koboldcpp', 'llama-server', 'llama-cli', 'vllm',
    'mlc_llm', 'mlc_chat', 'anythingllm', 'anything-llm',
    'litellm', 'open-webui', 'llamafile', 'text-generation-launcher',
    'text-generation-router', 'comfyui', 'invokeai'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%ollama serve%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%vllm.entrypoints%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-launcher%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llama.cpp%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%llamafile%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mlc_llm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%localai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%text-generation-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%oobabooga%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%stable-diffusion-webui%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%whisper%server%';

-- Running AI Coding Agent Processes
-- Detects AI coding assistants, agents, and AI-powered terminals
-- These tools can read/write files, execute code, and interact with internal systems
-- Covers: Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Aider, Cline, Roo Code,
-- Continue, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q, Sourcegraph Cody, Codex, Warp, Zed,
-- Pieces, ShellGPT, OpenHands, Supermaven
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'claude', 'cursor', 'windsurf', 'warp', 'zed',
    'tabnine', 'TabNine', 'WasmTabNine',
    'codeium_language_server', 'supermaven',
    'amazon-q', 'pieces-os', 'Pieces OS',
    'codex', 'aider', 'sgpt'
)
    -- Claude Code / Claude Desktop
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@anthropic-ai/claude-code%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%claude_desktop%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%com.anthropic.claudedesktop%'
    -- Cursor
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor.app%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Cursor Helper%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%cursor-retrieval%'
    -- Windsurf / Codeium
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%Windsurf%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium_language_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codeium%enterprise%'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%github.copilot%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-agent%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%copilot-language-server%'
    -- OpenAI Codex CLI
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%@openai/codex%'
    -- Aider
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider-chat%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%aider%--model%'
    -- Cline / Roo Code (VS Code extensions spawn node)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    -- Continue.dev
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continue.continue%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%continuedev%'
    -- Amazon Q / CodeWhisperer
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%codewhisperer%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%AmazonWebServices.amazon-q%'
    -- Sourcegraph Cody
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%sourcegraph.cody%'
    -- Tabnine
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%tabnine%'
    -- Warp terminal (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.warp.Warp%'
    -- Zed editor (has AI built in)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%dev.zed.Zed%'
    -- ShellGPT
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell_gpt%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%shell-gpt%'
    -- OpenHands / SWE-agent
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%swe-agent%'
    -- Pieces
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%pieces-os%'
    -- Supermaven
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%supermaven%';

-- AI API Servers Exposed on Network
-- Detects AI services listening on non-loopback addresses (network-exposed)
-- Ports: 11434 Ollama, 1234/43411 LM Studio, 4891 GPT4All, 1337 Jan,
-- 5001 KoboldCpp, 7860 Gradio/HF, 8080 llama.cpp/LocalAI/TGI,
-- 8000 vLLM, 4000 LiteLLM, 3000 Open WebUI, 3001 AnythingLLM,
-- 8188 ComfyUI, 9090 InvokeAI, 1000 Pieces
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
)
    AND l.address != '127.0.0.1'
    AND l.address != '::1';

-- AI API Servers Inventory (Including Localhost)
-- Inventories ALL AI services on known ports, including loopback
-- Complements ai_listening_ports which only flags network-exposed servers
SELECT
    l.port,
    l.address,
    l.protocol,
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid
FROM listening_ports l
JOIN processes p ON l.pid = p.pid
WHERE l.port IN (
    11434, 1234, 43411, 4891, 1337, 5001, 7860,
    8080, 8000, 4000, 3000, 3001, 8188, 9090, 1000
);

-- Installed AI Applications (macOS)
-- Detects AI desktop applications, coding tools, meeting AI, and productivity tools
SELECT
    name,
    path,
    bundle_identifier,
    bundle_short_version AS version,
    datetime(last_opened_time, 'unixepoch') AS last_opened_time
FROM apps
WHERE name IN (
    -- LLM runtimes
    'Ollama', 'LM Studio', 'GPT4All', 'Jan', 'Msty', 'AnythingLLM',
    -- AI chat/desktop
    'ChatGPT', 'Claude', 'Perplexity', 'DeepSeek', 'Poe',
    'Google Gemini', 'Microsoft Copilot',
    -- AI coding
    'Cursor', 'Windsurf', 'Zed', 'Warp', 'Void',
    'Pieces OS', 'Replit',
    -- AI image generation
    'DiffusionBee', 'Draw Things',
    -- AI productivity/meetings
    'Otter', 'Granola', 'Krisp', 'Raycast', 'TypingMind',
    'Notion', 'Craft'
)
    OR bundle_identifier IN (
    'com.openai.chat',
    'com.anthropic.claudedesktop',
    'ai.perplexity.app',
    'com.todesktop.230313mzl4w4u92', -- Cursor uses todesktop wrapper
    'com.ollama.ollama',
    'com.quora.poe',
    'dev.zed.Zed',
    'dev.warp.Warp-Stable',
    'com.raycast.macos',
    'ai.krisp.krispMac',
    'com.lmstudio.app',
    'com.codeium.windsurf',
    'io.gpt4all.gpt4all',
    'jan.ai',
    'com.diffusionbee.diffusionbee',
    'com.liuliu.draw-things',
    'notion.id',
    'com.lukilabs.lukiapp',
    'com.pieces.os',
    'com.msty.app'
);

-- Installed AI Applications (Windows)
-- Detects AI desktop applications, coding tools, and productivity tools
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    install_location,
    publisher,
    install_date
FROM programs
WHERE name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR name LIKE '%LM Studio%' OR name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR name LIKE '%Claude%' OR name LIKE '%Cursor%' OR name LIKE '%GPT4All%'
    OR name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR name LIKE '%Windsurf%' OR name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR name LIKE '%Jan%' OR name LIKE '%Msty%'
    OR name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Open WebUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%Warp%' OR name LIKE '%Zed%' OR name LIKE '%Poe%'
    OR name LIKE '%Amazon Q%' OR name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%Codeium%' OR name LIKE '%Tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%DiffusionBee%' OR name LIKE '%ComfyUI%'
    OR name LIKE '%LiteLLM%' OR name LIKE '%Notion%';

-- Installed AI Packages (Linux)
-- Detects AI-related system packages via deb and rpm package managers
-- Covers: LLM runtimes, AI desktop apps, GPU/CUDA drivers, AI coding tools
SELECT name, version, source, 'deb' AS pkg_type FROM deb_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor%'
    OR name LIKE '%windsurf%'
    OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%lm-studio%'
    OR name LIKE '%gpt4all%'
    OR name LIKE '%jan%'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt%'
    OR name LIKE '%claude%'
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity%'
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR name LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR name LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-cuda%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-cudnn%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-driver%'
    OR name LIKE '%libnvidia%'
    OR name LIKE '%codeium%'
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%zed-editor%'
    OR name LIKE '%warp-terminal%'
UNION ALL
SELECT name, version, source, 'rpm' AS pkg_type FROM rpm_packages
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor%'
    OR name LIKE '%windsurf%'
    OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%lm-studio%'
    OR name LIKE '%gpt4all%'
    OR name LIKE '%jan%'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt%'
    OR name LIKE '%claude%'
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity%'
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR name LIKE '%open-webui%'
    OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR name LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR name LIKE '%cuda%'
    OR name LIKE '%nvidia-driver%'
    OR name LIKE '%libnvidia%'
    OR name LIKE '%codeium%'
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine%'
    OR name LIKE '%amazon-q%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR name LIKE '%zed-editor%'
    OR name LIKE '%warp-terminal%';

-- Running MCP Server Processes
-- Detects Model Context Protocol servers bridging AI tools to local resources
-- MCP servers provide filesystem, database, and API access to AI assistants
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.cmdline LIKE '%@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp-server-%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%mcp_server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%fastmcp%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%';

-- MCP Configuration Files (macOS)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
-- Presence indicates MCP servers are configured (even if not currently running)
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/Users/%/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.mcp.json';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Linux)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE '/home/%/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude/settings.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.mcp.json';

-- MCP Configuration Files (Windows)
-- Detects MCP config files for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude\settings.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cursor\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\mcp.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.mcp.json';

-- AI Model Files (macOS)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
-- Covers: Ollama, LM Studio, HuggingFace, llama.cpp, GPT4All, Jan
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/jan/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files (Linux)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/models/blobs/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.lmstudio/models/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/hub/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp/%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.local/share/nomic.ai/GPT4All/%'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/models/%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files (Windows)
-- Detects large model files (>100MB) in known AI model storage directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\models\blobs\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.lmstudio\models\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\hub\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp\%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\nomic.ai\GPT4All\%'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (macOS)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user directories
-- Catches models outside standard tool directories (manual downloads, custom paths)
-- Extensions: .gguf (llama.cpp), .safetensors (HuggingFace), .llamafile (llamafile),
-- .ggml (legacy), .onnx (ONNX Runtime)
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/%.onnx'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Linux)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user and opt directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/%.onnx'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE '/opt/%/%.safetensors'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI Model Files by Extension (Windows)
-- Detects model weight files by extension in user directories
SELECT
    path,
    filename,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.gguf'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.safetensors'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.llamafile'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.ggml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\%.onnx'
)
AND size > 100000000;

-- AI/ML Python Packages
-- Detects installed AI frameworks, model libraries, agent toolkits, and AI SDKs
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory
FROM python_packages
WHERE name IN (
    -- Core ML frameworks
    'torch', 'tensorflow', 'onnxruntime', 'jax', 'flax',
    -- HuggingFace ecosystem
    'transformers', 'diffusers', 'accelerate', 'peft', 'trl',
    'huggingface-hub', 'tokenizers', 'datasets', 'sentence-transformers',
    'safetensors',
    -- AI provider SDKs
    'openai', 'anthropic', 'google-generativeai', 'cohere', 'replicate',
    'groq', 'mistralai', 'together', 'fireworks-ai', 'deepseek-sdk',
    -- Agent/orchestration frameworks
    'langchain', 'langchain-core', 'langchain-community',
    'llama-index', 'llama-index-core',
    'autogen', 'crewai', 'semantic-kernel', 'haystack-ai', 'dspy-ai',
    'instructor', 'guidance', 'outlines',
    -- Local inference
    'llama-cpp-python', 'ollama', 'vllm', 'ctransformers',
    'bitsandbytes', 'auto-gptq', 'exllama',
    -- MCP
    'fastmcp', 'mcp',
    -- Vector databases
    'chromadb', 'qdrant-client', 'weaviate-client', 'pinecone-client',
    'pymilvus', 'faiss-cpu', 'faiss-gpu',
    -- AI coding agents
    'aider-chat', 'shell-gpt', 'mentat',
    -- AI app frameworks
    'gradio', 'streamlit',
    -- Audio/speech
    'openai-whisper', 'whisper', 'elevenlabs', 'bark',
    -- Proxy/gateway
    'litellm',
    -- LLM CLI tools
    'llm'
);

-- AI Browser Extensions (Chrome/Chromium/Edge)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions for chat, coding, writing, and search
SELECT
    ce.name,
    ce.identifier,
    ce.version,
    ce.description,
    ce.path,
    u.username
FROM chrome_extensions ce
LEFT JOIN users u ON ce.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    ce.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR ce.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR ce.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR ce.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR ce.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR ce.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR ce.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR ce.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR ce.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI Docker Containers
-- Detects containers with AI/ML, MCP, vector DB, or image generation images
SELECT
    id,
    name,
    image,
    status,
    command,
    started_at
FROM docker_containers
WHERE
    -- LLM serving
    image LIKE '%ollama%' OR image LIKE '%vllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%text-generation%' OR image LIKE '%localai%'
    OR image LIKE '%llama.cpp%' OR image LIKE '%litellm%'
    -- ML frameworks
    OR image LIKE '%pytorch%' OR image LIKE '%tensorflow%'
    OR image LIKE '%triton%' OR image LIKE '%huggingface%'
    -- MCP servers
    OR image LIKE '%mcp%' OR image LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
    -- AI apps
    OR image LIKE '%open-webui%' OR image LIKE '%anythingllm%'
    OR image LIKE '%flowise%' OR image LIKE '%langflow%'
    -- Vector databases
    OR image LIKE '%chromadb%' OR image LIKE '%chroma%'
    OR image LIKE '%qdrant%' OR image LIKE '%weaviate%'
    OR image LIKE '%milvus%' OR image LIKE '%pinecone%'
    -- Image generation
    OR image LIKE '%comfyui%' OR image LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
    OR image LIKE '%invokeai%' OR image LIKE '%automatic1111%'
    -- AI workflow/agents
    OR image LIKE '%n8n%' OR image LIKE '%openhands%'
    OR image LIKE '%sweepai%' OR image LIKE '%pr-agent%';

-- AI Auto-Start Services (macOS launchd)
-- Detects AI tools configured to start automatically
SELECT
    label,
    path,
    program_arguments,
    run_at_load
FROM launchd
WHERE label LIKE '%ollama%' OR label LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR label LIKE '%gpt4all%' OR label LIKE '%jan%'
    OR label LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR label LIKE '%pieces%'
    OR label LIKE '%open-webui%' OR label LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR label LIKE '%comfyui%' OR label LIKE '%invokeai%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%llama-server%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR program_arguments LIKE '%mcp-server%';

-- AI Auto-Start Services (Windows)
-- Detects AI tools registered as Windows services
SELECT
    name,
    display_name,
    path,
    start_type,
    status,
    user_account
FROM services
WHERE name LIKE '%ollama%' OR name LIKE '%lmstudio%'
    OR name LIKE '%anythingllm%' OR name LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR name LIKE '%pieces%' OR name LIKE '%comfyui%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Ollama%' OR display_name LIKE '%LM Studio%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%AnythingLLM%' OR display_name LIKE '%LiteLLM%'
    OR display_name LIKE '%Pieces%'
    OR path LIKE '%ollama%' OR path LIKE '%litellm%'
    OR path LIKE '%llama-server%' OR path LIKE '%anythingllm%';

-- MCP npm Packages
-- Detects installed Model Context Protocol npm packages
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    directory,
    description
FROM npm_packages
WHERE name LIKE '@modelcontextprotocol/%'
    OR name LIKE 'mcp-server-%'
    OR name LIKE '%fastmcp%';

-- GPU-Equipped Systems (AI Inference Capability)
-- Detects NVIDIA, AMD, and Apple Silicon GPUs capable of running local LLMs
-- GPU presence + AI software = high-confidence shadow AI indicator
SELECT
    vendor,
    model,
    pci_class,
    pci_subclass,
    driver
FROM pci_devices
WHERE
    (vendor LIKE '%NVIDIA%' AND (pci_class = '0300' OR pci_class = '0302'))
    OR (vendor LIKE '%Advanced Micro Devices%' AND pci_class = '0300')
    OR vendor LIKE '%Apple%GPU%';

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (macOS)
-- Detects AI tool config/cache dirs even when tools are not running
-- Presence indicates the tool was installed and used at some point
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/lm-studio'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/gpt4all'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/llama.cpp'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/jan'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.continue'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cursor'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.codeium'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.tabnine'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.claude'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/github-copilot'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/shell_gpt'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.supermaven'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.anythingllm'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.invokeai'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml'
)
AND type = 'directory'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml';

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (Linux)
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/lm-studio'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/gpt4all'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/llama.cpp'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/jan'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.continue'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cursor'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.codeium'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.tabnine'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.claude'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/github-copilot'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/shell_gpt'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.supermaven'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.anythingllm'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.invokeai'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml'
)
AND type = 'directory'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml';

-- AI Browser Extensions (Firefox)
-- Detects AI-related browser extensions installed in Firefox
-- Complements ai_chrome_extensions for full browser coverage
SELECT
    fa.name,
    fa.identifier,
    fa.version,
    fa.description,
    fa.path,
    fa.active,
    u.username
FROM firefox_addons fa
LEFT JOIN users u ON fa.uid = u.uid
WHERE
    -- AI assistants & chat
    fa.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Merlin%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Sider%' OR fa.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%UseChatGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Poe%'
    -- AI coding
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Cody%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Codeium%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Tabnine%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Blackbox%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Phind%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Bito%'
    -- AI writing & productivity
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Grammarly%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Jasper%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Wordtune%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Quillbot%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%QuillBot%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Compose AI%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Writesonic%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Copy.ai%'
    -- AI search & research
    OR fa.name LIKE '%You.com%' OR fa.name LIKE '%AIPRM%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%WebChatGPT%'
    -- AI summarization
    OR fa.name LIKE '%Glasp%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Eightify%'
    OR fa.name LIKE '%NoteGPT%' OR fa.name LIKE '%tl;dv%'
    -- AI translation
    OR fa.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR fa.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%';

-- AI Browser Extensions (Safari)
-- Detects AI-related Safari web extensions on macOS
SELECT
    se.name,
    se.identifier,
    se.version,
    se.description,
    se.path
FROM safari_extensions se
WHERE
    se.name LIKE '%Copilot%' OR se.name LIKE '%ChatGPT%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Claude%' OR se.name LIKE '%Gemini%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Perplexity%' OR se.name LIKE '%DeepSeek%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR se.name LIKE '%Grammarly%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Quillbot%' OR se.name LIKE '%QuillBot%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%DeepL%' OR se.name LIKE '%Immersive Translate%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Poe%' OR se.name LIKE '%MaxAI%'
    OR se.name LIKE '%Sider%';

-- AI API Credential Exposure (macOS)
-- Detects files likely containing AI service API keys and credentials
-- Scans .env files, shell RC files, and known AI config locations
-- Presence of these files with AI-related content indicates credential exposure risk
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    -- .env files in common project locations
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.env.local'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/Projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/src/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/code/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/dev/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/repos/%/.env'
    -- AI-specific credential files
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.openai'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/openai/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/anthropic/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/groq/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/cohere/auth.json'
    -- HuggingFace tokens
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.cache/huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.huggingface/token'
    -- Ollama API config
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.ollama/auth'
    -- LiteLLM proxy config (contains API keys)
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.litellm/config.yaml'
    -- Shell-GPT config (contains API keys)
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.config/shell_gpt/.sgptrc'
    -- Aider config (may contain API keys)
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

-- AI API Credential Exposure (Linux)
-- Detects files likely containing AI service API keys and credentials
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/home/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.env.local'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/projects/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/src/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/code/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/repos/%/.env'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.openai'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/openai/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/anthropic/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/groq/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/cohere/auth.json'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.cache/huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.huggingface/token'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.ollama/auth'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.litellm/config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.config/shell_gpt/.sgptrc'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

-- AI API Credential Exposure (Windows)
-- Detects files likely containing AI service API keys and credentials
SELECT
    path,
    size,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.env.local'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\Projects\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\src\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\code\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\repos\%\.env'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.openai'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.anthropic'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\openai\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\anthropic\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\groq\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\cohere\auth.json'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface\token'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.huggingface\token'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama\auth'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\litellm_config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.litellm\config.yaml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\shell_gpt\.sgptrc'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.aider.conf.yml'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.aider.env'
)
AND size > 0;

-- Running Jupyter Notebook/Lab Servers
-- Detects Jupyter servers which are common AI development environments
-- Jupyter servers may expose notebooks with sensitive data, model training code,
-- and API credentials to the network
SELECT
    p.name,
    p.path,
    p.cmdline,
    p.pid,
    u.username,
    p.resident_size,
    datetime(p.start_time, 'unixepoch') AS start_time,
    p.parent AS ppid
FROM processes p
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.uid = u.uid
WHERE p.name IN (
    'jupyter', 'jupyter-lab', 'jupyter-notebook',
    'jupyter-server', 'jupyterhub', 'jupyterhub-singleuser'
)
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%notebook%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%lab%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyter%server%'
    OR p.cmdline LIKE '%jupyterhub%';

-- AI VS Code Extensions
-- Detects AI-related VS Code extensions installed on the system
-- VS Code extensions are stored as directories under ~/.vscode/extensions/
SELECT
    path,
    filename AS extension_id,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/pieces.pieces-vscode%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/phind.phind%'
    OR path LIKE '/Users/%/.vscode/extensions/bito.bito%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE '/home/%/.vscode/extensions/pieces.pieces-vscode%'
)
AND type = 'directory';

-- AI VS Code Extensions (Windows)
-- Detects AI-related VS Code extensions installed on Windows
SELECT
    path,
    filename AS extension_id,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\github.copilot%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\github.copilot-chat%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\saoudrizwan.claude-dev%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\rooveterinaryinc.roo-cline%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\continue.continue%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\sourcegraph.cody%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\codeium.codeium%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\tabnine.tabnine%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\amazonwebservices.amazon-q%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\supermaven.supermaven%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\blackboxapp.blackbox%'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.vscode\extensions\pieces.pieces-vscode%'
)
AND type = 'directory';

-- AI Service DNS Lookups (Windows)
-- Detects DNS resolutions to known AI service domains in the Windows DNS cache
-- Adapted from: dns_cache_snapshot_windows_elastic
-- Catches AI SaaS usage even without installed apps or browser extensions
SELECT
    name AS query_name,
    type AS query_type,
    flags
FROM dns_cache
WHERE (
    -- OpenAI / ChatGPT
    name LIKE '%openai.com'
    OR name LIKE '%chatgpt.com'
    OR name LIKE '%oaiusercontent.com'
    -- Anthropic / Claude
    OR name LIKE '%anthropic.com'
    OR name LIKE '%claude.ai'
    -- Google AI
    OR name LIKE '%generativelanguage.googleapis.com'
    OR name LIKE '%gemini.google.com'
    OR name LIKE '%aistudio.google.com'
    OR name LIKE '%notebooklm.google.com'
    -- Microsoft Copilot
    OR name LIKE '%copilot.microsoft.com'
    OR name LIKE '%bing.com/chat%'
    -- Meta AI
    OR name LIKE '%meta.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%llama.meta.com'
    -- Perplexity
    OR name LIKE '%perplexity.ai'
    -- Cohere
    OR name LIKE '%cohere.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%cohere.com'
    -- Mistral
    OR name LIKE '%mistral.ai'
    -- Groq
    OR name LIKE '%groq.com'
    -- Together AI
    OR name LIKE '%together.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%together.xyz'
    -- Fireworks AI
    OR name LIKE '%fireworks.ai'
    -- DeepSeek
    OR name LIKE '%deepseek.com'
    -- HuggingFace
    OR name LIKE '%huggingface.co'
    -- Replicate
    OR name LIKE '%replicate.com'
    -- Cursor
    OR name LIKE '%cursor.sh'
    OR name LIKE '%cursor.com'
    -- Codeium / Windsurf
    OR name LIKE '%codeium.com'
    -- Tabnine
    OR name LIKE '%tabnine.com'
    -- GitHub Copilot
    OR name LIKE '%copilot-proxy.githubusercontent.com'
    OR name LIKE '%githubcopilot.com'
    -- AI image generation
    OR name LIKE '%midjourney.com'
    OR name LIKE '%stability.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%leonardo.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%ideogram.ai'
    -- AI writing/productivity
    OR name LIKE '%jasper.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%writesonic.com'
    OR name LIKE '%copy.ai'
    -- AI meeting
    OR name LIKE '%otter.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%fireflies.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%krisp.ai'
    -- AI search
    OR name LIKE '%you.com'
    OR name LIKE '%phind.com'
    -- Ollama (if exposed remotely)
    OR name LIKE '%ollama.ai'
    OR name LIKE '%ollama.com'
);

-- AI Auto-Start Services (Linux systemd)
-- Detects AI tools configured as systemd services on Linux
-- Adapted from: services_suspicious_linux_elastic, startup_items_linux_elastic
-- Closes the Linux auto-start gap (macOS launchd and Windows services already covered)
SELECT
    su.id AS unit_id,
    su.description,
    su.load_state,
    su.active_state,
    su.sub_state,
    su.unit_file_state,
    su.fragment_path,
    datetime(f.mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time
FROM systemd_units su
LEFT JOIN file f ON f.path = su.fragment_path
WHERE su.id LIKE '%.service'
    AND su.fragment_path IS NOT NULL
    AND su.fragment_path != ''
    AND (
        -- LLM runtimes
        su.id LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%llama%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%localai%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%text-generation%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%jan%ai%'
        -- MCP servers
        OR su.id LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
        -- AI apps
        OR su.id LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%whisper%'
        -- Jupyter
        OR su.id LIKE '%jupyter%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%jupyterhub%'
        -- Vector databases
        OR su.id LIKE '%chromadb%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%qdrant%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%weaviate%'
        OR su.id LIKE '%milvus%'
        -- Also check fragment_path for binaries
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR su.fragment_path LIKE '%jupyter%'
    );

-- AI Scheduled Tasks (Windows)
-- Detects AI tools registered as Windows scheduled tasks
-- Adapted from: scheduled_tasks_suspicious_windows_elastic
-- Catches AI tools auto-starting via Task Scheduler (complements ai_windows_services)
SELECT
    st.name AS task_name,
    st.action AS command_line,
    st.path AS task_path,
    st.enabled,
    st.state AS task_state,
    st.hidden,
    datetime(st.last_run_time, 'unixepoch') AS last_execution,
    datetime(st.next_run_time, 'unixepoch') AS next_execution
FROM scheduled_tasks st
WHERE st.action IS NOT NULL
    AND st.action != ''
    AND (
        -- LLM runtimes
        LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%lm studio%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%llama.cpp%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%localai%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%jan.exe%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%msty%'
        -- AI coding tools
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%cursor%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%windsurf%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%codeium%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%tabnine%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%pieces%'
        -- MCP servers
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%modelcontextprotocol%'
        -- AI image generation
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        -- Jupyter
        OR LOWER(st.action) LIKE '%jupyter%'
        -- Task name matching
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%lmstudio%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(st.name) LIKE '%pieces%'
    );

-- AI Cron Jobs (Linux)
-- Detects AI tools scheduled via crontab
-- Adapted from: crontab_linux_elastic
SELECT
    c.command,
    c.path AS crontab_path,
    c.minute,
    c.hour,
    c.day_of_month,
    c.month,
    c.day_of_week
FROM crontab c
WHERE c.command IS NOT NULL
    AND c.command != ''
    AND (
        LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%ollama%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%llama-server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%llama.cpp%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%litellm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%localai%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%vllm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%gpt4all%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%anythingllm%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%open-webui%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%koboldcpp%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%comfyui%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%invokeai%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%stable-diffusion%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%mcp-server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%mcp_server%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%jupyter%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%whisper%'
        OR LOWER(c.command) LIKE '%huggingface%'
    );

-- AI Tool Configuration Directories (Windows)
-- Detects AI tool config/cache dirs even when tools are not running
-- Closes the Windows gap (macOS and Linux already covered)
SELECT
    path,
    type,
    datetime(mtime, 'unixepoch') AS modified_time,
    datetime(atime, 'unixepoch') AS accessed_time
FROM file
WHERE (
    path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.ollama'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\lm-studio'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\huggingface'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\gpt4all'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cache\llama.cpp'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\jan'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.continue'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.cursor'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.codeium'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.tabnine'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.claude'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\github-copilot'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.config\shell_gpt'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.supermaven'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.anythingllm'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\.invokeai'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\LM Studio'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\AnythingLLM'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Ollama'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\GPT4All'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Roaming\Jan'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Pieces'
    OR path LIKE 'C:\Users\%\AppData\Local\Cursor'
)
AND type = 'directory';

-- AI Homebrew Packages (macOS/Linux)
-- Detects AI tools installed via Homebrew
-- Many AI tools distribute via brew (Ollama, llama.cpp, etc.)
SELECT
    name,
    version,
    path,
    description
FROM homebrew_packages
WHERE name IN (
    'ollama', 'llama.cpp', 'llamafile', 'gpt4all',
    'vllm', 'litellm', 'localai',
    'huggingface-cli', 'transformers',
    'pytorch', 'tensorflow',
    'cursor', 'zed', 'warp',
    'aider', 'shell-gpt', 'llm',
    'chromadb', 'qdrant',
    'comfyui', 'whisper', 'whisper-cpp',
    'jupyterlab', 'jupyter'
)
    OR name LIKE '%ollama%'
    OR name LIKE '%llama%'
    OR name LIKE '%whisper%'
    OR name LIKE '%mcp-server%';
